build.consult.text: Every SME's stack is different — your industry, your existing tools, your regulators, your team's habits. We'd rather spend 30 minutes with you on a call than guess on your behalf. The two paths below are the conversation we'll have, not options you click. Once we've talked, we lock the right mix together.
build.consult.title: No self-serve here. No checkout button.
build.deploy.s1.desc: A 30-minute briefing. No slide deck, no NDA on the first call. Tell us your industry, your regulators, the workspace your team already lives in. We map the path together.
build.deploy.s1.title: Sit down with us.
build.deploy.s2.desc: Numbers, sender IDs, channels and compliance gates set up in your region. Plugged into the workspace and the ERP your team already uses. No rip-and-replace, no second migration.
build.deploy.s2.title: We provision quietly.
build.deploy.s3.desc: Your team sends from the tools they already know. The audit trail follows automatically. Your dedicated engineer's number sits next to your other emergency contacts. Not behind a ticket queue.
build.deploy.s3.title: Send and sleep.
build.dialog.error.text: We couldn't reach the inbox. Please try again, or email us at Salesmarketing@dolphlink.com.
build.dialog.error.title: Something went wrong.
build.dialog.success.text: Your details landed in our sales inbox. A real DOLPHLINK person will come back to you within 24 hours with a concrete plan tailored to your business.
build.dialog.success.title: Thanks — we've got it.
build.f.contact.name: Your name
build.f.formnote: Submitting sends this straight to our sales inbox. We'll come back within 24 hours.
build.f.need.messaging: Sending lots of messages at once
build.f.need.omnichannel: WhatsApp / SMS / email all in one inbox
build.flow.step1.desc: Five quick questions. What's hurting, what's working, what's missing.
build.flow.step1.title: Tell us what you need
build.flow.step2.desc: A real DOLPHLINK person calls back. We walk through the options together.
build.flow.step2.title: We chat, we map
build.flow.step3.desc: Two more conversations. Numbers and channels go live in your region.
build.flow.step3.title: We deploy
build.flow1.desc: New order, low-stock alert, refund request — your ERP fires a webhook to us, we route it through the right template and post to the right team channel. Each message carries an "open in ERP" deep link.
build.flow1.n1.label: Your ERP
build.flow1.n3.label: Workspace
build.flow1.n4.label: Your team
build.flow1.title: ERP signal → team workspace alert
build.flow2.desc: Customer submits a quote, refund or address-change request. Your existing approval flow handles internal sign-off (with the audit trail your auditor wants). On approval, we reach the customer on their preferred channel.
build.flow2.n1.label: Customer ask
build.flow2.n2.label: Approval flow
build.flow2.n4.label: Customer
build.flow2.title: Approval flow → customer notification
build.flow3.desc: Bookings, renewal calls, on-site service, contract expiry — a calendar event fires reminders 24h / 2h / 30min before. Multi-language, channel-routed, and customer replies land in the same workspace thread.
build.flow3.n1.label: Calendar
build.flow3.n3.label: Customer
build.flow3.n4.label: Workspace thread
build.flow3.title: Calendar event → automatic customer reminder
build.flows.fineprint: Your real stack is some mix of these. We'll figure out which mix in the call — usually 30 minutes is enough.
build.flows.heading: How the pieces fit together — three workflow shapes that cover most SMEs.
build.flows.intro: Whichever path you picked above, your real-world workflows usually fall into one of these three shapes. Mix and match.
build.hero.desc: No long form, no sales call to start — just tell us what you need, we come back with a plan, then we deploy. Most SMEs are live within days of finishing this page.
build.hero.title.l3: We assemble it around your business.
build.path.a1.desc: If you've already invested in an ERP, accounting tool, or workspace, we plug into it. No rip-and-replace. Same data, same login, same team habits.
build.path.a1.foot: + any system that can fire a webhook
build.path.a1.title: Use the tools you already have.
build.path.a2.cloud: **Cloud** · secure cloud, ours, yours, or any major public cloud
build.path.a2.connectivity: **Connectivity** · bank-grade carrier routes at SME prices
build.path.a2.desc: If you're starting clean, or the mainstream can't give you what you need, we put the DOLPHLINK pieces together. Three blocks. Same backbone we run for governments.
build.path.a2.foot: In our call we usually mix both angles — keep what works, swap what doesn't.
build.path.a2.platform: **Platform** · one panel for SMS, WhatsApp, voice, email, AI, audit log
build.path.a2.title: Or build it with us, fresh.
build.step1.intro: Tick the boxes that fit your business. We'll come back with a concrete plan in 24 hours.
build.step1.title: Tell us what you need.
build.step2.intro: This step is a conversation, not a checkout. After Step 01, a real DOLPHLINK person calls you back within 24 hours. We walk through the two angles below, ask the questions only you know the answers to, and decide the right shape together.
build.step2.title: We choose the stack together.
build.step3.intro: Three conversations carry you from Step 02 to live. The first one is the call we make in Step 02 — then two more as we go live.
build.step3.title: We deploy.
footer.copyright: © 2026 DOLPHLINK by Baiwu Technology Group · Singapore
sme.benefits.b1.desc: The same secure cloud we run for governments and central banks — now in an SME-sized package. Run it on our cloud, your private cloud, or any major public cloud you already use: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, Alibaba, Tencent, Huawei. You only pay for what you use. No two-year contracts. No rip-and-replace when you grow.
sme.benefits.b1.l1: Runs on our cloud, your private cloud, or any major public cloud
sme.benefits.b1.l2: Same bank-grade compliance posture wherever it runs
sme.benefits.b1.l3: One-click migration from your current vendor · data, history, templates all come with you
sme.benefits.b1.l4: Move between clouds later without losing your data
sme.benefits.b1.title: Cloud built for governments. Run on any cloud you choose.
sme.benefits.b2.desc: SMS, WhatsApp, voice, email, AI chatbot, audit log — all on one screen. One login. One bill. One place to look. Click to install, click to connect any tool you already use, click to deploy. Most vendors give you five dashboards. We give you one.
sme.benefits.b2.l1: One login, every channel · one bill, every region · one audit log for every regulator
sme.benefits.b2.l2: Click to install · click to go live · click to pause — 20 minutes from sign-up to first message
sme.benefits.b2.l3: 200+ ready-made bridges to your CRM, accounting, store, helpdesk · no engineer needed
sme.benefits.b2.l4: Two-way auto-sync · no more copy-paste between tools
sme.benefits.b2.title: One panel runs everything.
sme.benefits.b3.desc: The same tier-1 carrier routes the regulated banks use — 99.999% uptime — but with no volume floor, no enterprise minimum, and no hidden setup fees. Pay per message. 100+ countries covered. A real human at the other end of the line.
sme.benefits.b3.l1: Same routes the banks file through · 99.999% uptime
sme.benefits.b3.l2: Sender IDs, short codes, hosted numbers in 100+ countries
sme.benefits.b3.l3: No volume floor, no enterprise minimum to qualify
sme.benefits.b3.l4: Pay per message · the number you see is the number you pay
sme.benefits.b3.title: Bank-grade routes. SME prices.
sme.benefits.intro: The big global vendors hand you the tools and walk away. We do the rest. Here are three things you won't find anywhere else, all in one place.
sme.benefits.title: Three things only we do.
sme.gains.grow.desc: Most SME owners lose half their leads to slow replies. We don't. AI picks up at midnight on every channel — WhatsApp, SMS, voice, email. Bulk-send to your whole list in one click. Auto-recover abandoned carts and unconfirmed bookings while you sleep. Your team only handles the customers who already said yes. Everyone else gets a real answer first.
sme.gains.grow.hook: Open at 2 a.m. Without staying up.
sme.gains.grow.l1: AI answers in 60 seconds — any hour, any channel
sme.gains.grow.l2: Bulk-send to your list by name, region, language — one click
sme.gains.grow.l3: Auto-recover abandoned carts and unconfirmed bookings overnight
sme.gains.grow.l4: See which message and channel brought each sale
sme.gains.grow.title: Sell more. Without hiring more.
sme.gains.intro: Sell more. Spend less. The two long-term wins every small-business owner needs at the same time. Here's how we hit both, without choosing one or the other.
sme.gains.survive.desc: Pay only for what you actually send. No monthly minimum. No two-year contract. One panel replaces the five vendors you're juggling right now — SMS, WhatsApp, voice, email, audit log. One bill. One support line. One real human to call when something breaks. The number doesn't change whether you have twelve seats or twelve thousand.
sme.gains.survive.l1: Pay-as-you-send · no monthly floor, no setup fees
sme.gains.survive.l2: Five vendors replaced with one · SMS / WhatsApp / voice / email / audit
sme.gains.survive.l3: Cancel or pause anytime · no penalty
sme.gains.survive.l4: Same support line, same engineer, whatever your size
sme.gains.survive.title: Spend less. Without losing what works.
sme.gains.title: Two wins every SME owner is after.
sme.gap.c1.desc: The big vendors only call back when you're spending six figures. Small accounts get a polite "we'll get back to you", then silence.
sme.gap.c1.saver: We pick up. At 2 a.m. or 2 p.m. Whether you've got 12 seats or 12,000.
sme.gap.c1.title: "Hello? Anyone there?"
sme.gap.c2.desc: Their pricing was built for a Series-B startup that just raised thirty million. You have twenty staff. They quote you like you have two hundred.
sme.gap.c2.saver: Pay only what you actually send. No floor. No annual lock. The number you see is the number you pay.
sme.gap.c2.title: "How much?!"
sme.gap.c3.desc: API docs, OAuth scopes, callback URLs, retry policies. You just want to send a message to a customer, not become an engineer overnight.
sme.gap.c3.saver: Plug in. Send. Done. No engineer needed. Set the whole thing up over a coffee.
sme.gap.c3.title: "What's a webhook?"
sme.gap.c4.desc: PDPA, GDPR, MAS guidelines. One wrong template and you're fined. Small businesses don't have a compliance officer with a hundred pages of free reading time.
sme.gap.c4.saver: We carry the paperwork. Our compliance team reads the hundred pages. You sleep at night.
sme.gap.c4.title: "100 pages. Who reads this?"
sme.gap.intro: We've heard these the same four ways for years. Tap any card to see what we'd do for you.
sme.gap.pain.label: When this happens to you
sme.gap.title: Four pains every SME owner knows.
sme.hero.q2: "We can't be answering customers at midnight."
sme.hero.q3: "WhatsApp, SMS, email — three apps, one me."
sme.hero.q5: "PDPA, GDPR — we just want to do our work."
sme.hero.q6: "The big tools price us out by Wednesday."
sme.ind.auto.desc: Service complete? They know in seconds. Quote ready? They approve with one tap. Annual service due? We remind them. You sell the next service before they forget.
sme.ind.auto.title: "Your car is ready" — straight to their phone.
sme.ind.clinic.desc: Sent on the same carrier-grade lines the banks use, so they land. If patients want to reschedule, the request lands in your front desk's workspace for triage.
sme.ind.clinic.title: Appointment reminders patients actually open.
sme.ind.ecomm.desc: Shipped, in customs, out for delivery, arrived. Each step goes out on the channel each region prefers, in their own language. You don't translate anything.
sme.ind.ecomm.title: Order updates in your customer's own language.
sme.ind.fnb.desc: A friendly reminder goes out 24 hours before the booking. One tap to confirm or reschedule. Your floor manager sees the answer before service starts.
sme.ind.fnb.title: Fewer no-shows. Fuller tables.
sme.ind.hotel.desc: A warm welcome message in their language. Check-in instructions. WiFi password. Local tips. Most guest questions answered before they reach the front desk.
sme.ind.hotel.title: Welcome them before they walk in.
sme.ind.insurance.desc: Renewal reminders go out 30, 14 and 3 days before. Claim status updates as it moves. Policy documents arrive in their inbox. Your clients always know where things stand.
sme.ind.insurance.title: Renewals on time. Claims tracked. Clients trust you.
sme.ind.intro: Yours is probably one of these. We've already served the others. Same warmth, same engineer at the other end of the line. No matter which row you live in.
sme.ind.logistics.desc: Each new job lands on the right driver's phone. The customer gets a live ETA. You stop fielding "where's my parcel" calls.
sme.ind.logistics.title: Drivers know what to do. Customers know where you are.
sme.ind.manufacturing.desc: Every stage of the order updates the customer automatically. Late shipment? They hear it from you first, not from a complaint. Trust kept, even when life happens.
sme.ind.manufacturing.title: Order in. Made. Shipped. Delivered. Customer notified at every step.
sme.ind.professional.desc: Meeting reminders. "We need this signed" nudges. "Your filing is done" confirmations. The admin work that ate your hours, now ready before you walk into the office.
sme.ind.professional.title: Appointments, document reminders, status updates — all automated.
sme.ind.property.desc: Maintenance requests come in by SMS or WhatsApp. The team gets the work order. Tenant gets the resolved-status update. No tenant left waiting in silence.
sme.ind.property.title: Tenants ask. You fix. They know.
sme.ind.realestate.desc: Viewing reminders the day before. New-listing alerts to the right buyer. Offer-status updates to the seller. All in one thread, all from your phone.
sme.ind.realestate.title: Viewings confirmed. Offers tracked. Buyers don't slip away.
sme.ind.retail.desc: When someone walks away from their cart, we send the right nudge on the right channel. Replies come straight to your team. No app-switching.
sme.ind.retail.title: Win back customers who left without buying.
sme.ind.salon.desc: Reminders the day before. Re-booking nudges a month later. Last-minute openings sent to clients who said "next time". Your stylists work, you don't chase.
sme.ind.salon.title: Stylists stay busy. Chairs stay full.
sme.ind.schools.desc: Class announcements go out as a group SMS. Individual chats happen on WhatsApp. Teachers reply from the same workspace. Privacy rules already taken care of.
sme.ind.schools.title: Parents and teachers, one inbox.
sme.ind.title: The small businesses just like yours.
sme.ind.travel.desc: Booking confirmation. Trip reminder. Pickup details. Weather alert if their flight gets bumped. Nobody arrives confused. Nobody rings you at midnight.
sme.ind.travel.title: Itinerary, weather, pickup time — all before they fly.
sme.one.desc: Five vendors. Three logins. Two engineers on call. The complex workflow most SMEs end up with looks nothing like a business — it looks like glue. We collapse all of that into one panel, one bill, one team. Same backbone we run for governments, sized warm for yours. Twelve people or twelve thousand, the line doesn't change.
sme.one.s1.desc: A 30-minute briefing. No slide deck, no NDA on the first call. Tell us your industry, your regulators, the workspace your team already lives in. We map the path.
sme.one.s1.title: Sit down with us.
sme.one.s2.desc: Numbers, sender IDs, channels and compliance gates set up in your region. Plugged into the workspace and the ERP your team already uses. No rip-and-replace.
sme.one.s2.title: We provision quietly.
sme.one.s3.desc: Your team sends from the tools they already know. The audit trail follows automatically. Your dedicated engineer's number sits next to your other emergency contacts. Not behind a ticket queue.
sme.one.s3.title: Send and sleep.
